case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. VS. THOMAS CALLEA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-08-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
